theme.rationale: Perfect for a SaaS platform aimed at Marketing Agencies (Notion/HubSpot style). Prioritizes data clarity, structural hierarchy, and functional beauty with a professional yet modern aesthetic.

headings.note: CRITICAL: Never use Inter for headings.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8). Generous internal padding (p-6) for dashboard cards to avoid text collision with borders.

navigation.desktop: Fixed left sidebar (w-64) with 1px right border. Solid background.
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu. Do not hide desktop links behind hamburger.

kanban.column: w-[320px] shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-muted/50 p-4 rounded-lg
kanban.card: bg-surface border border-border p-4 rounded-md shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-grab

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, rounded-lg (8px radius). No default drop-shadow, rely on borders.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Only use for sticky headers if needed: backdrop-blur-xl bg-surface/80 border-b border-border.

interactions.hover: Explicit text and bg color changes on hover (e.g., hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground). Translate-y-[-2px] for interactive cards.
interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 focus:outline-none
interactions.animations: Use framer-motion for drag-and-drop in Kanban. Keep transitions crisp (150-200ms) for a snappy SaaS feel.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Use primary color heavily limited to core actions (Save, Create Lead). Use outline/ghost variants for secondary actions.
components.tables: Dense rows, 1px border-b, hover:bg-muted/50 on rows. Left-align text, right-align numbers.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Textarea. Labels must be bold and small (text-sm font-medium).
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Tooltips must have dark/light mode contrast.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, kanban cards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='create-lead-button').

avatars.description: Male professional avatar for CRM or HR module
Male professional avatar 2 for CRM or HR module

placeholders.description: Team meeting image for 'Projetos' or 'Campanhas' cover images
Modern office team meeting for 'Projetos' covers

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure FastAPI + React + MongoDB stack is properly configured.
Install 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' fonts from Google Fonts.
Implement Shadcn UI components and customize them based on the 'surfaces' and 'colors' guidelines above (max 8px border-radius, 1px subtle borders, no muddy shadows).
Build a persistent Sidebar navigation with active states clearly visible.
For the Kanban module (Módulo Comercial), use a drag-and-drop library (like dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd) with a horizontally scrolling container and fixed-width columns.
Ensure dark mode is fully functional, using the specific dark background/surface colors provided.
All text must be in Portuguese (BR).
Strictly follow the 'data-testid' requirement for all interactive elements to ensure testability.
